pi_items.source: Task description, setup_task.sh (line 12, 15), export_result.sh (line 12), and verifier.py (line 48) all consistently reference this path
Web search verified that DXF color code 7 = White per standard AutoCAD Color Index (ACI). Task description line 1 confirms 'STITCH_LINE (White/7)'
Web search verified that DXF color code 1 = Red per standard AutoCAD Color Index (ACI). Task description line 1 confirms 'SEAM_ALLOWANCE (Red/1)'
Web search verified that DXF color code 4 = Cyan per standard AutoCAD Color Index (ACI). Task description line 1 confirms 'FOLD_LINE (Cyan/4)'
Task description states 'rectangle 350mm wide x 400mm high'. Verifier expects 348-352 range (line 110). Geometry calculation confirms 350mm
Task description states 'rectangle 350mm wide x 400mm high'. Verifier expects 398-402 range (line 110). Geometry calculation confirms 400mm
Task description states 'Position the bottom-left corner at (100, 100)'. Used consistently in all scripts and verified in geometry calculations
Task description states 'Position the bottom-left corner at (100, 100)'. Used consistently in all scripts and verified in geometry calculations
Task description line 3 states 'Apply a 30mm chamfer to the two bottom corners'. Verifier checks for diagonal geometry indicating chamfer (lines 115-142)

Task description line 4 states 'create a 15mm offset outside the entire bag body shape'. Verifier expects dimensions 378-382 x 428-432 (15mm offset on all sides of 350x400 gives 380x430, confirmed by calculation)
Task description line 5 states 'horizontal line representing the hem, 40mm down from the top edge'. Verifier expects Y position 450-470 (geometry calculation confirms Y=460 = 500-40)
Calculated from body_width (350) + 2 * offset_size (15): 350 + 15 + 15 = 380. Verifier expects 378-382 (line 156)
Calculated from body_height (400) + 2 * offset_size (15): 400 + 15 + 15 = 430. Verifier expects 428-432 (line 156)
Calculated from origin_y + body_height - fold_offset: 100 + 400 - 40 = 460. Verifier expects 450-470 (line 173)

privileged_info_summary: The tote bag pattern task is a synthetic creative task (not based on real-world data). All metadata values are verified against the task description, verifier logic, and standard DXF specifications. Verified dimensions: body rectangle 350mm x 400mm positioned at origin (100, 100); 30mm chamfer on bottom corners; 15mm offset seam allowance creating 380mm x 430mm outer bounds; fold line at Y=460 (40mm down from top at Y=500). Layer colors verified per DXF standard: STITCH_LINE color 7 (white), SEAM_ALLOWANCE color 1 (red), FOLD_LINE color 4 (cyan). Output file path: /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/tote_bag_pattern.dxf.
